payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. Roles enforced across the whole API: replica gate (reads viewer, writes member), sync pull viewer / push member + actor authz, project lifecycle owner-only (rename/archive), members+invites router self-gates (owner for invites/role changes, LAST_OWNER guard). Verified: viewer can read but POST /api/tickets returns 403 FORBIDDEN_ROLE.
